name: O-1 seed corpus: agent-datasets/<review-subagent>.jsonl supplies ~30 hand-graded inputs per review subagent so P-2 eval datasets can bootstrap
command: ok=0; bad=0; for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/agent-datasets"/review-*.jsonl; do [ -s "$f" ] || continue; n=$(wc -l < "$f" | tr -d ' '); if [ "$n" -ge 30 ]; then ok=$((ok+1)); else bad=$((bad+1)); fi; done; [ "$ok" -ge 1 ] && [ "$bad" -eq 0 ] && echo "subagent_datasets_ok=$ok" 1>&2
